headline: Google Ventures makes surprise $30 million SpaceX-era bet
summary: The next major space company might not be building rockets It may not be launching satellites into space, flying tourists to the edge of the atmosphere, or competing with Elon Musk’s SpaceX for the next big thing in orbit. Instead, it might accomplish something a little less glamorous: helping ...

headline: Singapore Breaks into Top 5 Financial Hubs, Researchers Say
